page.not_found_body: The page you requested was not found or an error occurred.
page.error_body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
page.load_patient_print: Could not prepare patient list for print.

access.admin_or_super: Access denied. Admin or Super Admin only.
access.patient_delete: Only Admin or Super Admin can delete patients.
access.payroll: You do not have access to Payroll & HR.
access.hr_self: Access denied. HR self-service is not enabled for your role.
access.section: Access denied. You do not have permission to open this section.

portal.no_access: You do not have access to this portal.

payment.not_found: No payment ticket matches this code.
payment.pending: Payment is still pending at cashier.
payment.already_validated: This code has already been validated.
payment.usage_limit: This code has reached its usage limit.
payment.patient_missing: Patient record not found for this ticket.
payment.not_valid: This payment code is not valid.
payment.no_paid_ticket: No paid payment ticket matches this code. Check the code or complete payment at Cashier first.

flash.a_valid_phone_number_is_required: A valid phone number is required.
flash.select_medication_to_dispense: Select at least one medication line to dispense.
flash.admission_not_active_or_bed_not_assigned: Admission not active or bed not assigned.
flash.allowance_settings_restored_to_legal_def: Allowance settings restored to legal defaults.
flash.telemedicine_request_submitted: Telemedicine request submitted — waiting for doctor confirmation.
flash.bed_is_not_in_housekeeping_or_could_not_: Bed is not in housekeeping or could not be updated.
flash.bed_must_be_marked_available_before_admi: Bed must be marked Available before admitting — use Mark Ready after housekeeping.

flash.cannot_remove_this_bed_a_patient_is_stil: Cannot remove this bed — a patient is still admitted.
flash.choose_an_item_and_enter_how_many_units_: Choose an item and enter how many units to add (at least 1).
flash.consultation_room_cleared_for_this_visit: Consultation room cleared for this visit.
flash.med_prescription_fields_required: Each prescribed drug requires dosage, frequency, and days. Check: {{drug}}.
flash.could_not_load_legacy_module_editor: Could not load legacy module editor.
flash.date_of_birth_or_age_is_required: Date of birth or age is required.
flash.delete_failed_could_not_remove_patient_r: Delete failed — could not remove patient row (constraints).
flash.doctor_now_uses_clinic_default_hours: Doctor now uses clinic default hours.
flash.email_is_required_when_portal_access_is_: Email is required when portal access is enabled.
flash.enter_and_validate_the_ipd_payment_code_: Enter and validate the IPD payment code from Cashier before confirming discharge.
flash.external_result_uploaded_and_attached_to: External result uploaded and attached to patient chart.
flash.follow_up_visit_registered_under_your_ex: Follow-up visit registered under your existing payment rules. Complete vitals / queue steps as required, then continue the consultation.
flash.invalid_payment_code_ward_validation_mus: Invalid payment code. Ward validation must match Cashier settlement.
flash.line_not_found_or_already_dispensed: Line not found or already dispensed.
flash.line_unlocked_for_correction_re_enter_fi: Line unlocked for correction. Re-enter findings in the template workbench and save.
flash.line_unlocked_for_correction_re_enter_re: Line unlocked for correction. Re-enter results in the template workbench and save.
flash.hospitalisation_payment_required: Validate the hospitalisation (HOS) payment code at Cashier, or enable Pay Later to assign the bed.
flash.hospitalisation_code_required: Only a paid hospitalisation (HOS) fee code can be used for bed assignment.
flash.payment_code_patient_mismatch: This payment code belongs to a different patient.
flash.new_sku_added_to_stock_registry: New SKU added to stock registry.
flash.no_active_pharmacy_items_in_service_cata: No active pharmacy items in Service Catalog. Open Catalog → Pharmacy and import the pharmacy price list first.
flash.no_home_portal_is_assigned_for_your_role: No home portal is assigned for your role. An administrator must set Role Portals in Access Control.
flash.no_pharmacy_inventory_rows_found_import_: No pharmacy inventory rows found. Import the pharmacy catalog into inventory first, then apply the stock sheet.
flash.no_settlement_code_on_file_cashier_must_: No settlement code on file. Cashier must settle this admission before ward discharge.
flash.online_access_is_not_enabled_for_this_em: Online access is not enabled for this email. Please ask reception to turn on the patient portal for your record.
flash.signed_out_after_inactivity: Signed out after {{minutes}} minute{{suffix}} of inactivity.
flash.patient_discharged_bed_flagged_for_clean: Patient discharged. Bed flagged for cleaning — use Mark Ready when the room is clean.
flash.patient_not_found_or_already_deleted: Patient not found or already deleted.
flash.patient_record_is_inactive_restore_the_p: Patient record is inactive. Restore the patient or register again.
flash.patient_record_missing_for_this_visit_ch: Patient record missing for this visit. Check the patient directory or front-desk registration.
flash.please_enter_the_email_and_password_you_: Please enter the email and password you were given at registration.
flash.please_sign_in_to_join_the_consultation: Please sign in to join the consultation.
flash.portal_account_disabled_contact_the_clin: Portal account disabled. Contact the clinic.
flash.portal_password_not_set_contact_the_clin: Portal password not set. Contact the clinic to set your access.
flash.refund_already_processed_for_this_admiss: Refund already processed for this admission.
flash.refund_required_select_a_refund_method: Refund required. Select a refund method.
flash.returned_for_correction_open_lab_templat: Returned for correction. Open Lab templates, re-enter results for this patient, and save — the same registry row will update.
flash.returned_for_correction_open_radiology_t: Returned for correction. Open Radiology templates, re-enter the exam report, and save — the same registry row will update.
flash.sku_and_product_name_are_required: SKU and product name are required.
flash.select_an_item_and_enter_a_non_zero_quan: Select an item and enter a non-zero quantity change (+ or −).
flash.that_sku_code_is_already_in_use: That SKU code is already in use.
flash.that_inventory_item_was_not_found: That inventory item was not found.
flash.that_slot_is_no_longer_available: That slot is no longer available.
flash.this_account_is_inactive_please_contact_: This account is inactive. Please contact the clinic.
flash.this_payment_code_is_on_its_last_valid_u: This payment code is on its last valid use allowance. After this follow-up, the patient will need a new consultation payment at the cashier.
flash.this_visit_has_no_patient_linked_re_regi: This visit has no patient linked. Re-register the visit at front desk.
flash.triage_saved_and_patient_advanced_to_wai: Triage saved and patient advanced to Waiting Doctor.
flash.use_cancel_visit_from_the_opd_queue_acti: Use Cancel Visit from the OPD queue actions menu.
flash.use_modules_permissions_on_the_access_co: Use Modules & permissions on the Access Control page.
flash.use_the_apply_stock_sheet_button_on_inve: Use the Apply Stock Sheet button on Inventory (POST action). Opening this URL directly does not run the import.
flash.validate_the_rad_service_code_before_cre: Validate the RAD service code before creating a radiology request.
flash.vitals_retake_requested: Vitals retake requested. The patient is back on the OPD queue for nursing to record new vitals.
flash.vitals_retake_status_blocked: Vitals cannot be retaken for this visit in its current status.
flash.vitals_retake_none: No vitals are recorded for this visit yet.
flash.vitals_required_before_consult: Record vitals for {{name}} before sending the patient for consultation.
flash.vitals_payment_required: This patient does not have a valid payment code. Ask the patient to obtain a payment code from the cashier before recording vitals.
flash.vitals_doctor_forbidden: Doctors cannot record vitals. Nursing staff must record vitals from the OPD queue.
flash.vitals_already_recorded: Vitals have already been recorded for this visit. No further changes are allowed.
flash.vitals_no_active_visit: No active OPD visit found for vitals.
flash.consult_payment_required: Please validate the payment code first.
flash.prescription_needs_consult: A consultation is required before prescribing for this OPD patient. Start a consultation from the OPD queue, or use Follow Up if the patient is returning under a valid prior payment code.
flash.er_prescription_needs_consult: Prescription requires a consultation record — create one first.
flash.lab_rad_payment_or_request: Please validate the payment code. No request has been received from IPD or Emergency.
flash.lab_rad_alert_only: A charge alert exists but no formal lab/radiology order was placed. Ask the doctor to create an order from the consultation or ER chart before adding a new test.
flash.wallet_created_successfully_you_can_top_: Wallet created successfully. You can top up now.
flash.ward_and_bed_label_are_required: Ward and bed label are required
flash.you_can_only_confirm_appointments_assign: You can only confirm appointments assigned to you.
flash.you_can_only_decline_appointments_assign: You can only decline appointments assigned to you.
flash.your_user_account_is_not_linked_to_a_sta: Your user account is not linked to a staff record; follow-up cannot be started.
flash.duplicate_patient: A patient with the same name, date of birth/age, and phone already exists (#{{id}} — {{name}}). Open their record instead of creating a duplicate.
flash.pharmacy_autofill_completed: Pharmacy "Used for" auto-fill completed. Review Uncategorized items and adjust if needed.
flash.selected_physician_not_assigned_dept: Selected physician is not assigned to the {{dept}} department. Update their profile or choose another doctor.
flash.admission_not_found_or_discharged: Admission not found or already discharged.
flash.select_valid_service_catalog: Select a valid service from the catalog.
flash.select_assigned_physician: Select the assigned physician for this consultation.
flash.physician_not_match_specialisation: Selected physician does not match the chosen specialisation.
flash.physician_not_eligible_general: Selected physician is not eligible for general consultation.
flash.ticket_not_found_or_paid: Ticket not found or already paid.
flash.no_visit_for_patient: No visit found for that patient.
flash.physician_not_assigned_dept: {{name}} is not assigned to the {{dept}} department.
